case.title: HARRIS v. FLA. REAL ESTATE COMM'N.

opinion.h1: HARRIS v. FLA. REAL ESTATE COMM'N., 371 U.S. 7 (1962)
opinion.h4: HARRIS v. FLORIDA REAL ESTATE COMMISSION ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF FLORIDA. No. 100. Decided October 8, 1962.
opinion.p: The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE GOLDBERG took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
